---
title: "Sensor Network"
format: html 
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Bahamas Sea Level Sensor Locations 

This page will have information on the sensors, what islands they are on and  the map that will have clickable links to the data page for each sensor. 


```{r map}
library(leaflet)

sensors <- data.frame(
  name = c("Nassau", "Freeport", "Exuma"),
  lat = c(25.0443, 26.5285, 23.6190),
  lon = c(-77.3504, -78.6954, -75.9695)
)

m <- leaflet()
m <- addProviderTiles(m, providers$CartoDB.Positron)
m <- setView(m, lng = -76.5, lat = 24.5, zoom = 6)

m <- addMarkers(
  m,
  lng = sensors$lon,
  lat = sensors$lat,
  popup = sensors$name,
  label = sensors$name
)

m
```
